output_schema.confidence: float 0.0 to 1.0, converted to 0-100 for analysis

canonical.template: age: [age]; plasma_CA19_9: [plasma_CA19_9]; creatinine: [creatinine]; LYVE1: [LYVE1]; REG1B: [REG1B]; TFF1: [TFF1]; REG1A: [REG1A]

retrieval_context.template:
Here are similar patient cases for reference:

Case 1: [features] -> Outcome: [label]
...
Now predict for the following patient:

[target patient prompt]

families.B_instruction: Instruction paraphrase prepended to the unchanged patient record.
families.C_json: Patient record rendered as a JSON object.
families.C_csv: Patient record rendered as a CSV header and row.
families.C_markdown: Patient record rendered as a markdown table.
families.D_numeric_precision: Feature values rendered with varied numeric precision.
families.E_delimiters: Feature-value pairs joined with alternate delimiters.
families.F_retrieval: Retrieved context depth/diversity is varied while target facts stay fixed.
families.Composite: Instruction, order, and delimiter perturbations applied together.
families.G_feature_mask: One or two features are removed.
families.H_controlled_rounding: All numeric values are rounded aggressively.
families.I_noise: Bounded numeric noise is added to values.
families.J_missingness: One or two feature values are replaced by missing-value tokens.
